description: This file contains unit tests for the Alert component, testing its instantiation, behavior, and integration with jQuery, including event handling, method calls, and DOM interactions.

classes.name: Alert
classes.description: The Alert class manages alert component behavior, including show/hide, dispose, and event handling.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Returns the existing Alert instance associated with a DOM element, or null if none exists.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Returns the existing Alert instance or creates a new one if none exists.
